name: Daemonic Pact
label: Daemons
notes: Shared by Chaos Knights and Heretic Astartes armies (and CK+CSM soup). Per-god Battleline ratio: non-Battleline units of a god included this way cannot exceed Battleline units of that god included this way. Points values provisional pending dataslate.

name: Iconoclast Fiefdom — Wretched Thralls
label: Damned
notes: The Iconoclast Fiefdom detachment lets a Chaos Knights army include Chaos Space Marines DAMNED units. Points limit provisional pending dataslate.

name: Brood Brothers
label: Brood Brothers
notes: A Genestealer Cults army may include ASTRA MILITARUM units. A GENESTEALER CULTS model must be Warlord; included Astra Militarum models lose Voice of Command.

name: The Star Children's Blessings
label: Tyranids
notes: The Final Day detachment lets a Genestealer Cults army include TYRANIDS VANGUARD INVADER units (excluding Aircraft, Broodlord, Genestealers). No Tyranids model can be Warlord.

name: World Eaters — Chaos Knights Allies
label: Chaos Knights
notes: World Eaters may ally in Chaos Knights. Points limit provisional pending dataslate.

name: World Eaters — Khorne Daemons Allies
label: Daemons of Khorne
notes: World Eaters may ally in KHORNE Daemons. Points limit provisional pending dataslate.

name: Death Guard — Chaos Knights Allies
label: Chaos Knights
notes: Death Guard may ally in Chaos Knights. Points limit provisional pending dataslate.

name: Death Guard — Nurgle Daemons Allies
label: Daemons of Nurgle
notes: Death Guard may ally in NURGLE Daemons. Points limit provisional pending dataslate.

name: Thousand Sons — Chaos Knights Allies
label: Chaos Knights
notes: Thousand Sons may ally in Chaos Knights. Points limit provisional pending dataslate.

name: Thousand Sons — Tzeentch Daemons Allies
label: Daemons of Tzeentch
notes: Thousand Sons may ally in TZEENTCH Daemons. Points limit provisional pending dataslate.

name: Emperor's Children — Chaos Knights Allies
label: Chaos Knights
notes: Emperor's Children may ally in Chaos Knights. Points limit provisional pending dataslate.

name: Emperor's Children — Slaanesh Daemons Allies
label: Daemons of Slaanesh
notes: Emperor's Children may ally in SLAANESH Daemons. Points limit provisional pending dataslate.

name: Chaos Space Marines — Chaos Knights Allies
label: Chaos Knights
notes: Chaos Space Marines may ally in Chaos Knights (their Daemon access is the shared Daemonic Pact rule). Points limit provisional pending dataslate.
